headline: BTC remains the clearest strength signal in the starter watchlist.
ETH is mixed and less decisive.
Equities coverage still needs a stronger data layer before high confidence.
risks: Macro and regulatory shifts remain material.
Narrative can outrun evidence without structured data.

historyEntry.title: Baseline brief wired into dashboard
historyEntry.summary: Daily market brief is now feeding dashboard state, with BTC strongest and equities still under-covered.
historyEntry.nextAction: Add structured equity market data and improve recurring brief quality.
